calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval On Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval On Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christina Sanchez, administrator in pro per.

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

The Court noted that no petition for final distribution or statement of status of administration was on file. Ms. Sanchez stated that she believed documents had been prepared with the assistance of a third party but acknowledged that no filings appeared on the docket.

The Court continued the matter to April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and advised Ms. Sanchez to seek assistance to move the matter forward.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval On Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Continued To Dec-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christina Sanchez appeared in person (pro per).

Ms. Sanchez stated that she submitted her papers on April 18, 2025, and that the Inventory and Appraisal should be filed soon. The matter is continued to July 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozado. Not reported (D204).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Continued To Jul-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christina Sanchez, Administrator in Pro Per.

Ms. Sanchez stated that she had attempted to file her Inventory and Appraisal through a third-party vendor, but the system was down, and she was unclear whether the document had been processed.

The Court continued the matter to July 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow confirmation of filing. Ms. Sanchez was informed that if the inventory and appraisal is filed prior to the continued date, the matter will go off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (personal):
Anita Sanchez, in propria persona, Administrator.

At the court's query, Ms. Sanchez reports as to her failure to appear at the last calling and of the status of an Inventory and Appraisal which she's been advised is with the probate referee and will be filed as soon as she receives it. The court admonishes Ms. Sanchez re the importance of keeping track of court dates.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear/Order to Show Cuse is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is continued to Jun-17-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Ms. Sanchez is instructed to file the required document by Jun-10-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To May-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Status on Filing Inventory and Appraisal is continued to May-06-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator in propria persona Anita H. Sanchez to appear on May-06-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed.

An Order to Show Cause as to why the court should not order Anita H. Sanchez to pay sanctions in the amount of $250 for failure to appear (pursuant to CCP 128) is also set for May-06-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.
